faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Elmhurst?
faqs.answer: Cricket control services in Elmhurst typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Why do I have crickets in my Elmhurst home?
faqs.answer: Crickets are attracted to moisture, warmth, and shelter, making Elmhurst basements, crawl spaces, and gardens ideal habitats. They often enter through cracks in foundations, gaps around doors and windows, or through basement access points common in Queens row houses and older apartment buildings.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations in Elmhurst can be significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of initial treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 1-2 weeks depending on infestation severity. We offer same-day service for emergency situations and provide follow-up visits to ensure complete eradication.

faqs.question: Are your cricket treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved cricket control products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our certified technicians. We follow strict safety protocols and can discuss pet-friendly and eco-friendly treatment options during your free consultation.
